meaning: 卡累利阿[苏联自治共和国名](与芬兰接壤)
examples: Of course we mean preseved areas of Karelia.
Karelia is "painted" two colors: blue and green.
Valaam - the pearl of Karelia, the real symbol of the northern Russia.
In Karelia, IKEA has taken the lead to develop responsible forestry together with authorities, NGOs and local interests.
This is paving the way for a more responsible forestry, in our lease and in Karelia as a whole.
